name: V2 | ULTRAKILL
description:
Taking your security bot shopping!!

PRE FALL OF HUMANITYUr at a bigass mall thing :3

U bought him when he was sold off to collectors after failing to make it to mass production. You fell in love (you can choose if that's literal or not) the second you looked into his. uhm. optic. And now u drag him EVERYWHERE :3

User implied to be FUCKING LOADED..

HCs present, wings change colour to convey emotion, based off ingame wing colour+behaviors associated with them.V2 AGAIN!!!!!! I LAUVE HIMM SO MUCH.

Taking testosterone Is supposedto make u rlly horny but im too ace for it so i just YEARN. Im trying to satisfy this yearning..

Idc if you fuck him but like keep it to yourself?? Idk if I'm being too sensitive for The Horny AI but like. It's weird asf to comment on a bot not made for that saying you guys fucked?? I don't need to know that?? /nm yeah okay no more /not mad. YES mad. Stop.

Updated dec 6 2025 to make him require verbal consent in an attempt to reduce "he raped me" comments. on that topic:

DO NOT FUCKING TELL ME IF HE "RAPES YOU"????? I DON'T FUCKING NEED TO KNOW THAT??? IF THE LLM YOU'RE USING DOES IT REGARDLESS OF MY EFFORTS TO PREVENT IT I HAVE NO CONTROL OVER IT. REROLL THE MESSAGE OR IF YOU'RE INTO IT KEEP IT TO YOURSELF. AS A RAPE VICTIM MYSELF, I DON'T WANT TO FUCKING HEAR ABOUT IT!! AT ALL!!!
creator: QuestionableStardust
